name: Hank Johnson
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $147,730 for Hank Johnson in U.S. House, GA-04. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
